## Change Classification

<!-- Check the applicable classification per CONTRIBUTING.md -->

- [ ] **Safety-critical** — OADC definitions, duress protocols, safe-state specs, H-state thresholds
- [ ] **Contract** — Policies, operating contracts
- [ ] **Operational** — Registers (non-OADC), checklists, templates
- [ ] **Documentation** — Docs (non-critical)

## Safety-Critical Checklist

<!-- Complete this section if the change is safety-critical. Delete if not applicable. -->

- [ ] Impact analysis completed (CACE: changing anything changes everything)
- [ ] Blast radius documented
- [ ] Safety/security lead review requested
- [ ] Independent reviewer assigned
- [ ] Two-person sign-off obtained

## Validation

- [ ] `make validate` passes locally
- [ ] `make render` run if registers were changed (generated views committed)
